roa.docketEntryComment: DFT'S ATTY REQUEST TO CONVERT PROBATION FROM FORMAL TO COURT;FILED

/AJW/CH3:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 4 D/CTS: 4/CTORD: THE STAY AWAY ORDER ISSUED 07-27-17 IS TERMINATED FORTHWITH/SA2: VIRGINIA DE VASQUEZ DE ROMERO/X: THE ORDER IS A  DO NOT HARRASS  ORDER,/SAORD/WS/RESTV/X: IT IS ANTICIPATED THATUPON COMPLETION OF ANGER MANAGEMENT COUNSELING, PROBATION WILL CONVERT FROM FORMAL TO COURT PROBATION,/IND/X: DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE A COURSE OF ANGER MANAGEMENT COUNSELING AND OTHERCOUNSELING AT THE DIRECTION OF APD,/VF2:150/PC/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE LIABLE FOR PROBATION COSTS ONLY FOR THATPERIOD OF TIME THAT PROBATION IS SUPERVISED BY APD,/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA//COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/MO PC 17B/MO GRTD/X: THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO COUNT THREE,/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTSENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X: ALEX LEMIEUX APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE NAMED VICTIM,/X: THE NAMED VICTIM WILL REFUSE TO TESTIFY,/X: THE PEOPLE ARE UNABLE TO PROCEED DUE TO THE NON-APPEARANCE OF THEIR WITNESS,/X:THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE CASE,/X: THE ISSUES AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING THE MISSING WITNESS AND WILL STAY THE ORDER UNTIL THE NEXT CALLING,/CGTW/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TWA/SAORD/SA1:VIRGINIA DE ROMERO/SAORD1/X:THE COURT SIGNS A SECOND CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER IN THIS  MATTER AS FOLLOWS:/SA1:REINA GARCIA/SAORD2/SAORD3/ORNAS/CONTD:I&A, P&C/DOP/
